---
title: "Dr. Lukas Röseler"
subtitle: "Postdoctoral Researcher & Managing Director of the Münster Center for Open Science"
about:
  id: me
  template: trestles
  image: img/profile_osig.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: building
      text: Institution
      href: https://www.uni-muenster.de/PsyIFP/AEBack/members/roeseler.html
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:lukas.roeseler@uni-muenster.de
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/aufdroeseler.bsky.social
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/lukasroeseler
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lukas-röseler-598720298/
    - icon: database-fill
      text: OSF
      href: https://osf.io/tqx69/
    - icon: book-fill
      text: ResearchGate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Lukas-Roeseler
toc: false # Turns off the Table of Contents specifically for the homepage to keep it clean
---

:::{#me}

*(He/Him)* | [🔊 Pronunciation](#) 

## About Me
I am a postdoctoral researcher at the University of Münster, Germany, and the managing director of the Münster Center for Open Science. I see myself as a strong proponent for Open Science and Open Scholarship.

## Mission
My goal is to improve the accessibility and quality of research. I advocate for repetitive research (e.g., reproductions, replications) to be routinely conducted and acknowledged as an integral part of healthy science. 

To achieve this, I actively collaborate with a large team of researchers on the **FORRT Replication Hub**, where we provide scholars with tools to find, conduct, and publish replications.

## Featured Projects & Resources
* 🌐 [FORRT Replication Hub](https://forrt.org/replication-hub)
* 📘 [Reproductions and Replications Handbook](https://forrt.org/replication_handbook)
* 📖 [Open Science Book (German)](https://lukasroeseler.github.io/opensciencebuch/)

## Education
* **PhD in Psychology** (2021) — *First-generation academic*
* **M.Sc. in Consumer Psychology and Market Research** (2017)
* **B.Sc. in Business Psychology** (2016)

:::

<br>

::: {.callout-tip icon=false}
## Call for Submissions: *Replication Research (R2)*
The Münster Center for Open Science and FORRT are hosting the multidisciplinary, diamond open-access journal **Replication Research (R2)** that launched in fall 2025. The journal is now open for submissions for reproductions and replications. 
:::
